problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
hypothesis: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Telomerase. Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
